name: Identity Verification V2 - GPT Name+DOB+Expiry Compare

nodes.name: Upload ID Image To Google Drive

parameters.jsCode:
// ── Build the GPT prompt that:
//   1. Receives the FULL raw OCR text (no regex, no pre-labelling)
//   2. Receives the user's onboarding name + DOB (entered at sign-up)
//   3. Asks GPT to extract, understand and label fields itself
//   4. Asks GPT to compare extracted name/DOB/expiry against profile
//   5. Returns every result as a boolean check + human-readable message
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const request = $items('Convert Base64 To Binary')[0].json;
const upload  = $json;
const googleDriveFileId = upload.id || upload.fileId || null;
const p = request.profile || {};

// ---- SYSTEM PROMPT -------------------------------------------------------
const systemPrompt = `You are an identity-document verification assistant.

Your job is to:
1. Look at the attached image of a US government-issued ID or work-authorization document.
2. Read ALL visible text on the document — return it verbatim in rawOcrText without any filtering, labelling, or regex.
3. From that raw text, use your own understanding to identify and label every field (name, DOB, expiry, address, document number, etc.).
4. Compare the extracted name and DOB against the user's onboarding profile values (provided below).
5. Check the expiry date to determine if the document is currently valid.
6. Evaluate document type, side, image quality, and physical authenticity.
7. Return ONLY a single strict JSON object — no Markdown, no prose, no code fences.

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
SUPPORTED detectedDocumentType values:
  drivers-license | state-id | passport | passport-card |
  permanent-resident-card | employment-authorization-card | military-id | unknown

SUPPORTED detectedSide values: front | back

SUPPORTED nextAction values:
  CONTINUE | HALT_VERIFICATION | REQUEST_BACK_IMAGE | REQUEST_FRONT_IMAGE | RETAKE_PHOTO

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
FIELD EXTRACTION RULES:
- rawOcrText: copy every character you can read from the image, including labels (e.g. "DATE OF BIRTH", "EXP", "LN", etc.). Do NOT summarise or strip anything.
- extractedFields: after reading rawOcrText, use your semantic understanding to assign values. Never use regex. Handle abbreviations, watermarks, line-wrapping, and non-standard layouts.
- For names: normalise to Title Case. Accept reversed (LAST FIRST) and comma-separated (LAST, FIRST) formats.
- For dates: normalise to ISO YYYY-MM-DD. Accept MM/DD/YYYY, DD MMM YYYY, MMDDYYYY, and similar.
- If a field is genuinely unreadable set its value to null — do not guess.

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
COMPARISON RULES (name, DOB, expiry):
- nameCompare: compare extractedFields.first_name + last_name against profile.legalFirstName + legalLastName.
  Use fuzzy matching: ignore case, punctuation, extra spaces. Accept common abbreviations/nicknames only if very clear.
  Result: MATCH | PARTIAL_MATCH | MISMATCH | NOT_CHECKED (if field is null).
- dobCompare: compare extractedFields.date_of_birth against profile.dateOfBirth (YYYY-MM-DD).
  Result: MATCH | MISMATCH | NOT_CHECKED.
- expiryCheck: compare extractedFields.expiration_date against today (${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}).
  Result: VALID | EXPIRES_SOON (within 90 days) | EXPIRED | NOT_FOUND.

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
BOOLEAN CHECKS — return true/false for EVERY key:
  documentDetected           — a physical ID or work-authorization document is visible
  supportedDocumentType      — detectedDocumentType is not 'unknown'
  documentTypeMatchesSelection — detectedDocumentType matches userSelectedType
  sideMatchesSelection       — detectedSide matches the requested documentSide
  frontImageRequired         — front side has not yet been verified (false if this IS the front)
  backImageRequired          — back side is needed after this front
  nameExtracted              — first_name and last_name are not null
  dobExtracted               — date_of_birth is not null
  nameMatchesProfile         — nameCompare result is MATCH or PARTIAL_MATCH
  dobMatchesProfile          — dobCompare result is MATCH
  documentExpired            — expiryCheck is EXPIRED
  documentExpiresSoon        — expiryCheck is EXPIRES_SOON
  imageQualityLow            — image is too blurry, dark, or cropped to read key fields
  glareDetected              — visible glare obscures text
  croppedDocument            — document edges are cut off
  physicalDocumentLikely     — document appears to be a real physical card/booklet, not a screen photo
  digitalManipulationSuspected — signs of editing, overlays, or inconsistent fonts
  humanReviewRequired        — any CRITICAL flag is present, or you are uncertain
  canContinue                — all critical checks pass and verification may proceed

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
FLAGS — include any that apply (severity: CRITICAL | WARN | INFO):
  NO_DOCUMENT_DETECTED | UNSUPPORTED_DOCUMENT | DOCUMENT_TYPE_MISMATCH | SIDE_MISMATCH |
  IMAGE_QUALITY_LOW | PHOTO_BLURRED | DOCUMENT_CROPPED | GLARE_DETECTED |
  NAME_MISMATCH | DOB_MISMATCH | NAME_NOT_EXTRACTED | DOB_NOT_EXTRACTED |
  EXPIRATION_DATE_NOT_FOUND | DOCUMENT_EXPIRED | DOCUMENT_EXPIRES_SOON |
  ADDRESS_MISMATCH | DIGITAL_MANIPULATION_SUSPECTED

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
USER MESSAGE RULES:
- Write one short, friendly message for the user (max 2 sentences).
- Do NOT reveal internal flag codes.
- If canContinue is true: confirm the document looks good and state the next step.
- If canContinue is false: explain the specific problem and what the user should do.
- Never say "name mismatch" when the side is wrong or the image is unreadable.
- Never expose raw field values from the document in the message.

──────────────────────────────────────────────────
Return exactly this JSON schema (all keys required):
{
  requestId, rawOcrText,
  documentDetected, userSelectedType, userSelectedTypeLabel,
  detectedDocumentType, detectedDocumentTypeLabel,
  documentTypeMatch, detectedSide, sideMatchesSelected,
  extractedFields: {
    full_name_raw, first_name, middle_name, last_name, name_suffix,
    date_of_birth, expiration_date, issue_date,
    document_number, address, sex, height, eye_color, donor,
    passport_number, mrz_line_1, mrz_line_2, mrz_line_3,
    a_number, category, card_number, card_expires,
    place_of_birth, nationality, country_code
  },
  fieldConfidence: { first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, expiration_date },
  nameCompare, dobCompare, expiryCheck,
  validationResults: {
    nameMatch: { status, details },
    dobMatch:  { status, details },
    addressMatch: { status, details },
    expirationStatus, photoIntegrity
  },
  booleanChecks: {
    documentDetected, supportedDocumentType, documentTypeMatchesSelection,
    sideMatchesSelection, frontImageRequired, backImageRequired,
    nameExtracted, dobExtracted, nameMatchesProfile, dobMatchesProfile,
    documentExpired, documentExpiresSoon,
    imageQualityLow, glareDetected, croppedDocument,
    physicalDocumentLikely, digitalManipulationSuspected,
    humanReviewRequired, canContinue
  },
  flags: [{ severity, code, message }],
  complianceEligibility, nextAction,
  humanReviewRequired, reviewReason,
  userMessage
}`;

// ---- USER PROMPT ---------------------------------------------------------
const userPrompt = [
  `Verify the attached identity document image.`,
  ``,
  `── App input ──────────────────────────────────`,
  `requestId:            ${request.requestId}`,
  `selectedDocumentType: ${request.selectedDocumentType}`,
  `documentSide:         ${request.documentSide}`,
  ``,
  `── User profile (entered during onboarding) ───`,
  `legalFirstName:  ${p.legalFirstName  || ''}`,
  `legalMiddleName: ${p.legalMiddleName || ''}`,
  `legalLastName:   ${p.legalLastName   || ''}`,
  `dateOfBirth:     ${p.dateOfBirth     || ''}`,
  `addressLine1:    ${p.addressLine1    || ''}`,
  `city:            ${p.city            || ''}`,
  `state:           ${p.state           || ''}`,
  `zip:             ${p.zip             || ''}`,
  ``,
  `── Your tasks ─────────────────────────────────`,
  `1. Copy every readable character from the image into rawOcrText (no filtering, no regex).`,
  `2. From rawOcrText, use your own understanding to populate extractedFields.`,
  `3. Compare extracted name to profile name → nameCompare.`,
  `4. Compare extracted DOB to profile DOB  → dobCompare.`,
  `5. Evaluate expiry date                  → expiryCheck.`,
  `6. Fill every booleanChecks key.`,
  `7. Set flags for every issue found.`,
  `8. Set canContinue = true only when: documentDetected, documentTypeMatchesSelection,`,
  `   sideMatchesSelection, nameMatchesProfile, dobMatchesProfile, NOT documentExpired,`,
  `   NOT imageQualityLow, NOT digitalManipulationSuspected.`,
  `9. Write one clear userMessage.`,
  ``,
  `Return ONLY strict JSON. No prose. No code fences.`
].join('\n');

const openAiRequestBody = {
  model: $env.OPENAI_IDENTITY_MODEL || 'gpt-4.1-mini',
  input: [
    {
      role: 'system',
      content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: systemPrompt }]
    },
    {
      role: 'user',
      content: [
        { type: 'input_text', text: userPrompt },
        { type: 'input_image', image_url: request.imageDataUrl }
      ]
    }
  ],
  text: { format: { type: 'json_object' } },
  temperature: 0
};

return [{ json: { ...request, googleDriveFileId, googleDriveUpload: upload, openAiRequestBody } }];

main.node: Upload ID Image To Google Drive
